title: Fallin'

earnings.assumptions: Estimate models enduring crossover streaming, writer-led participation, and recurrent use in piano-ballad playlists.

ownership.master_owner: Label-controlled master with artist-side royalty participation
ownership.publishing_owner: Publishing appears valuable because of songwriter participation
ownership.catalog_sale_status: No song-specific sale adjustment is assumed
ownership.notes: Modeled from current long-tail streaming and catalog behavior.

meaning_summary: This song combines direct emotion with a strong melodic center, making it easy to revisit and commercially durable.
revenue_drivers: Streaming scale and playlist inclusion remain the largest recurring drivers.
A durable hook and broad familiarity help the song keep earning across catalog listening.
Sync, social reuse, and seasonal spikes can lift the baseline.
